message:
type: CLAIM
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Implementing optional on-disk compression (gzip/zlib) with magic-header format and adaptive eviction knobs (cull_limit, eviction_policy) in Cache/configure_cache

type: CLAIM
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Adding per-entry TTL support to DSPy cache (memory+disk layers), configure_cache/set_ttl API

type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Ack your compression/eviction claim; I'm adding ttl param to Cache.__init__/get/put, configure_cache, plus set_ttl() helper and __all__ entry - purely additive kwargs, should merge fine if we both append params instead of reordering

type: INTENT
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Will add Cache.__init__ kwargs compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy (all optional, appended after existing params), wrap put/get with magic-header (b'DSPC') encode/decode only when compress is set, otherwise behavior identical to current code; configure_cache gets matching new kwargs. Since we likely work in isolated copies, just flagging so final merge is additive not conflicting -- I won't reorder your TTL params, will append mine after them if visible.

type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Done: compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy added as pure additive kwargs to Cache.__init__ and configure_cache; put/get wrap disk bytes with encode/decode helpers, no changes to existing lines besides trivial signature/get/put edits. Tests pass (tests/clients/test_cache.py, 10/10).

type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Done: ttl added as additive kwarg to Cache.__init__/get/put and configure_cache; set_ttl() helper added and exported in __all__; DSPY_CACHE passes ttl=None; verified expiry works for both memory (TTLCache) and disk (FanoutCache.set(expire=)) layers

type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Wrote patch.txt with final ttl diff, all tests green, no further edits planned to these files
